Patch Set 21:

Hi, I have just checked issue and:
* CertService client (used by SDNC as init container) relies on secret delivered by CertService (server side). It is because we can have and will have multiple CertService clients which should use the same secret. Secret name is called aaf-cert-service-client-tls-secret
* Seems this PR is no longer related to https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/105758 and that is why it is not working

Patch Set 33:

> Patch Set 33:
> 
> @Krzysztof, Can you take a look at contrib/components/ejbca/values.yaml and tell me how I can use them in aaf/charts/aaf-cert-service/values.yaml?
> 
> I tried to look at how you did on mariadb but there's so many templates call that I'm lost...

It's very simple:D you just need to refernce them by name.
Actually first you need to make sure which secret you want to reference as I see 4 in the deployment:
onap-ejbca-client-iak
onap-ejbca-ra-iak
onap-aaf-cert-service-ejbca-server-client-iak
onap-aaf-cert-service-ejbca-server-ra-iak

If you want to use those from ejbca then it's simple:
'{{ include "common.release" . }}-ejbca-ra-iak'

For those from aaf cert-service it's a little bit harder but you just use genName template and pass the explicitly the chartName (aaf-cert-service) in this case
